title: TS23 1PY, Blue Phoenix Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/TP3438EG/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Blue Phoenix Limited   Installation name: Cleveland IBA Facility   Permit number: EPR/TP3438EG/V005   "
